creator: Alexander Terp
description: From #139: remind has three concurrent state writers (a 60s launchd checker, dialog dismissals hours later, interactive adds). Atomic save_state (tmp+rename) is carded separately in next; this is the second half - an opt-in advisory lock for scripts that genuinely have concurrent invocations. Open design questions: lock scope, timeout, behavior on contention. Parked low until a second script needs it.
title: Opt-in advisory lock for concurrent script invocations
